scripts.dev:shared: npm run build --workspace @flowos/db && npm run build --workspace @flowos/shared -- --watch
scripts.build:swift-helper: HOME=/tmp/flowos-swift-helper CLANG_MODULE_CACHE_PATH=/tmp/flowos-swift-helper/clang-cache SWIFTPM_ENABLE_PLUGINS=0 swift build --package-path swift-helper -c debug
scripts.native: npm run build:swift-helper && npm run build --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run build --workspace @flowos/electron && npm run native --workspace @flowos/electron --
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @flowos/db && npm run build --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run build --workspace @flowos/electron && npm run build --workspace @flowos/renderer && npm run build --workspace @flowos/extension-chrome
scripts.typecheck: npm run build --workspace @flowos/db && npm run build --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/electron && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/renderer && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/extension-chrome && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @flowos/db
